title: Miscellaneous Dimensions in Data Warehousing
description: A flowchart showing the role and types of miscellaneous dimensions in a data warehouse schema, including their relationships to fact tables and core dimensions
elements: Miscellaneous Dimensions (e.g., Transaction Type, Promotion Type, Status Codes)
relationships: Fact table connects to core dimensions via foreign keys
Fact table connects to miscellaneous dimensions via foreign keys
Multiple small miscellaneous dimensions can be combined into a single junk dimension
Miscellaneous dimensions provide descriptive context for fact table measures
